title: Robust Roasted Dutch Beef Skewers
description: A traditional Dutch dish featuring coriander leaves and a bitter, chewy texture, now adapted to be diabetic-friendly and cooked to perfection on a binchotan-grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Wrap each skewer in a sheet of papillote paper, making sure to seal the edges tightly.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Remove the skewers from the grill and carefully unwrap the papillote paper.
Sprinkle the chopped coriander leaves over the beef and serve immediately.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the skewers before serving.
